ai_extraction.description: The AI analyses your book text. Review the suggestions before applying them.

error.not_configured: AI is not configured (Settings > AI Assistant).

offline_import.drop_hint: Drop a file here to import
offline_import.title: Import
offline_import.drop_zone: Drop a file here or click to browse
offline_import.accepted: Markdown, text, HTML, JSON backup, Medium export (.zip), backup (.bgb).
offline_import.as_new_book: New book (the file becomes the first chapter)
offline_import.as_existing_book: New chapter in an existing book
offline_import.unknown_hint: This format cannot be imported offline.

github_import.token_hint: Stored locally only and sent only to GitHub. Raises the rate limit and unlocks private repos.
github_import.error_rate_limit: GitHub rate limit reached. Add a token to raise the limit.

url_import.hint: Markdown, HTML or text from a public URL. The page must allow CORS.

tts.unavailable: Your browser does not support speech output.
tts.settings_hint: Choose a default voice and speed for browser-native speech output. Device-dependent; works offline.

feature.requires_network: This feature requires an internet connection.
feature.requires_desktop_app: This feature requires the Bibliogon desktop app
feature.requires_ai_key: This feature requires a configured AI key (Settings > AI Assistant)
feature.not_yet_available: This feature is not yet available.
feature.provider_cors_blocked: This AI provider can't be reached directly from the browser (CORS). Use the Bibliogon desktop app, or switch to Gemini.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.

story_bible.title: Story Bible
story_bible.no_appearances: No appearances yet. Drag this entry onto a page in the Storyboard.
story_bible.load_error: Failed to load the Story Bible.
story_bible.empty_all: No entries yet. Add one in a group above.
story_bible.name: Name

dashboard.title: My Books
dashboard.search_placeholder: Search by title, author, genre or language...
dashboard.empty_filtered_hint: No books match the current filters.
dashboard.delete_permanent_warning: Permanently delete this book? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.empty_trash_warning: All books in the trash will be permanently deleted.
dashboard.welcome_text: Create your first book, import an existing project, or check out the getting started guide.

bulk.limit_warning_50: Selecting more than 50 books may take a while.

selective_export.title: Selective export
selective_export.description: Choose which data areas to export. The result is a JSON file that can be re-imported through the import wizard.
selective_export.chapters_auto_hint: Chapters are exported automatically with the books.
selective_export.empty_selection: Please select at least one area.

backups.full_backup_description: Exports or imports all data (books, chapters, articles, authors, settings, story bible) as a single JSON file. Works offline too.
backups.compare_backups_tooltip: Compare two .bgb files from your filesystem
backups.clear_all_confirm_body: The .bgb files on disk are kept — only the log is cleared.

compare.title: Compare Backups
compare.transition_note: An integrated version control with automatic save points is planned. For now, you can compare any two .bgb backups from your filesystem.

editor.published_warning_body: Warning: This work has been published. A title change must be updated manually on the publishing platform (e.g. KDP).
editor.empty_title: Create your first chapter to get started.
editor.empty_hint: Click "New Chapter" below, or pick a different chapter type from the sidebar.
editor.save_failed: Saving chapter failed. Your changes are preserved locally.
editor.save_failed_offline: You are offline. Changes are saved locally.
editor.ai_custom_placeholder: e.g. Make the tone more formal...
editor.ai_select_text: Select text first for AI suggestions
editor.ai_fix_issue_loading: AI is working on the sentence...
editor.ai_review_hint: Analyzes the full chapter for style, coherence, and pacing.
editor.recovery_desc: Changes from {timestamp} found that were not saved to the server. Restore?

sidebar.save_template_tooltip: Save the book structure as a reusable template

git_sync.title: Sync to Git Repository
git_sync.sidebar_tooltip: Commit current book state to the linked Git repository
git_sync.status_error: Could not load Git sync status.
git_sync.unmapped_body: This book was not created via the Git URL importer, so there is no linked repository to sync.
git_sync.clone_missing_body: The previously cloned repository path no longer exists. Please re-import the book via the Git URL importer to restore the link.
git_sync.dirty_warning: The local clone has uncommitted changes. They will be overwritten by this sync.
git_sync.clone_missing: Local clone is missing. Please re-import the book from its repository.
git_sync.push_auth_failed: Push failed: not authorized. Please check your SSH key or credentials.
git_sync.push_unavailable: Push to remote is not yet available. The commit was created locally.
git_sync.diff_remote_unreachable: Repository unreachable. Check the connection or repository URL.
git_sync.diff_empty: No changes between Bibliogon and repo. {count} chapters unchanged.
git_sync.diff_keep_tooltip: Keep the Bibliogon version (no DB update)
git_sync.diff_take_tooltip: Take the repo version (DB will be overwritten)
git_sync.diff_mark_conflict_tooltip: Write both versions into the chapter with conflict markers (resolve manually)
git_sync.unified_banner: This book also has Bibliogon-Git active. 'Commit everywhere' fires both commits in one step.
git_sync.unified_commit_tooltip: Commit to both Bibliogon-Git and the external repo
git_sync.unified_lock_busy: Another commit is running. Please wait a moment.
git_sync.credential_hint: Stored encrypted and shared with core git backup. HTTPS remotes only; SSH uses the Bibliogon SSH key.

git.title: Git Backup
git.not_initialized: No repository for this book yet. Initialize one to start committing.
git.not_cloned: The repository is configured but not set up locally yet. Initialize a local clone to start committing.
git.pull_diverged: Local and remote changes have diverged — resolve via Git Backup.
git.pat_hint: The PAT is stored encrypted and never returned. Use a private repository.
git.push_rejected: Push rejected. Remote has newer commits. Pull first or accept remote.
git.diverged: Local and remote diverged. Manual resolution required.
git.conflict_resolve_body: For each affected file: keep the local or remote version. A merge commit is then created.
git.confirm_accept_local: Force-push the local version to the remote? Any remote commits will be overwritten and lost.
git.conflict_diverged_body: Both sides have their own commits. Choose: merge (decide per file on conflicts), ignore remote (force push), or cancel.
git.conflict_push_rejected_body: The remote has newer commits that are not present locally. Decide which side wins:

ssh.title: SSH Key for Git-Sync
ssh.intro: One Ed25519 keypair per install. The public half is added to GitHub/GitLab/Gitea; the private half stays local (file mode 0600).
ssh.comment_hint: Shown as the key label in the host UI.
ssh.confirm_overwrite: Overwrite existing key? The old key becomes invalid.
ssh.confirm_delete: Delete key? SSH push/pull will stop working until a new key is generated.
ssh.host_hint: Paste this key at your git host (GitHub → Settings → SSH keys, GitLab → Preferences → SSH Keys).

content_types.blogpost_description: Short to medium-length post — the default.
content_types.tutorial_description: Step-by-step guide with difficulty level and estimated duration.
content_types.review_description: Critique of a work — book, product, film, etc.
content_types.essay_description: Longer, reflective prose on a topic.
content_types.newsletter_description: Recurring post with issue number and send date.
content_types.interview_description: Conversation with another person — name and role of the partner.

export_dialog.title: Export
export_dialog.manual_toc_hint: Your existing table of contents will be used (no auto-generated one).
export_dialog.auto_toc_hint: A table of contents will be auto-generated (existing one ignored).
export_dialog.ai_assisted_hint: Some platforms (e.g. Amazon KDP) require disclosure of AI-assisted content.
export_dialog.missing_images_hint: Check whether the listed image files still exist in the book.
export_dialog.dry_run_hint: Generates only the first paragraph of the first chapter. Verifies engine and voice work and shows estimated cost.

create_book.title: New Book
create_book.author: Author
create_book.add_to_authors_error: Could not add the author to the database.
create_book.subtitle: Subtitle

childrens_picture_book.name: Children's Picture Book
childrens_picture_book.description: A short illustrated story for young readers. Front matter kept minimal, five story pages, and an about-the-author page.

sci_fi_novel.name: Sci-Fi Novel
sci_fi_novel.description: A novel-length science fiction story with a prologue, ten chapters, and an epilogue. Standard fiction layout.

non_fiction_how_to.name: Non-Fiction / How-To
non_fiction_how_to.description: A practical non-fiction guide with foreword, preface, introduction, seven lessons, appendix, and bibliography.

philosophy.name: Philosophy
philosophy.description: A philosophical work with preface, introduction, six numbered chapters, conclusion, and bibliography.

memoir.name: Memoir
memoir.description: A personal memoir framed by a prologue and epilogue, with eight narrative chapters and acknowledgments.

save_template.title: Save as template
save_template.name: Name
save_template.content_preserve_hint: Copies chapter text into the template
save_template.name_taken: A template with this name already exists
save_template.no_chapters: This book has no chapters to save

template_picker.delete_confirm: Delete template '{name}'? This cannot be undone.

chapter_template_picker.title: Choose a chapter template
chapter_template_picker.delete_confirm: Delete template '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
chapter_template_picker.group_hint: Group: inserts multiple chapters at once

save_chapter_template.title: Save chapter as template
save_chapter_template.name: Name
save_chapter_template.content_preserve_hint: Copies the current chapter content into the template
save_chapter_template.name_taken: A template with this name already exists

data.description: Review storage usage, export or import data, and clean up local caches.
data.export_description: Save your data as a JSON file. The full backup works online and offline.
data.import_description: Restore a backup or an authors list. Existing entries are not overwritten.
data.maintenance_description: Clean up local helper data. Books, articles, and chapters are untouched.
data.clear_event_log_confirm_body: The local diagnostic history (recent steps) is deleted. Your content stays unchanged.
data.clear_event_log_error: Could not clear the event log
data.clear_image_cache_confirm_body: Cached images (covers, article thumbnails) are removed. They can be reloaded when needed.
data.clear_image_cache_error: Could not clear the image cache

settings.title: Settings
settings.backups_description: Inspect backup history and compare .bgb files.

danger_zone.backup_first_message: All books, articles, chapters, authors, settings and story-bible data will be permanently deleted.
danger_zone.backup_import_hint: You can restore this JSON backup later under Settings → Backups → Import backup (online or offline).
danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.description: Resets the entire app to its first-install state. All books, articles, chapters, comments, uploads, settings and the AI API key will be permanently deleted.
danger_zone.reset_dialog_warning_intro: This action CANNOT be undone. The following will be deleted:
danger_zone.reset_dialog_warning_drafts: All unsaved drafts in the browser
danger_zone.reset_dialog_warning_keeps: Preserved: The app itself and the launcher install state.
danger_zone.reset_dialog_backup_offer: Would you like to create a backup first?

settings.topics_description: Topics available in the article editor's dropdown.
settings.topics_hint: Topics appear as a dropdown in the article editor. A topic is an article's primary category.
settings.app_settings_description: Language, theme, default views and general app preferences.
settings.author_profile_description: Your own author identity — real name and pen names you publish your own books and articles under. Stays private in this Bibliogon install.
settings.autoren_intro: Two separate sections: your own author profile above (just for you), and the catalogue of other authors below as an autocomplete source. They are intentionally distinct — pen names in your profile do NOT auto-appear in the catalogue.
settings.pen_names_hint: When creating a new book, you can choose between your real name and pen names.
settings.author_sync_to_db_done: Profile authors added to the database
settings.author_sync_to_db_error: Could not add profile authors to the database
settings.plugin_settings_description: Enable, configure or remove installed plugins.
settings.available_plugins_hint: These plugins are installed but not yet activated:
settings.no_active_plugins: No active plugins. Click "Add Plugin" to activate available plugins.
settings.remove_confirm: really remove? The configuration will be deleted.
settings.plugin_status_wrong_application: Plugin built for a different application
settings.plugin_status_identity_deprecation_warni: Plugin does not declare its target application
settings.plugin_status_missing_target_application: Plugin does not declare its target application
settings.erscheinungsbild_description: Theme and default views for the Books and Articles dashboards.
settings.defaults_hint: The pre-selected type when creating new books and texts. A type parameter in the URL takes precedence.
settings.erweitert_description: SSH keys for Git host authentication.
settings.dashboard_books_view_tooltip: Initial view when opening the books dashboard. Can be changed any time via the icon at the top right.
settings.dashboard_articles_view_tooltip: Initial view when opening the articles dashboard. Can be changed any time via the icon at the top right.
settings.dashboard_books_trash_view_tooltip: Initial view when opening the books trash. Toggles inside the trash are session-local and do not overwrite this setting.
settings.dashboard_articles_trash_view_tooltip: Initial view when opening the articles trash. Toggles inside the trash are session-local and do not overwrite this setting.
settings.trash_info: Books in trash will be automatically deleted after {days} days
settings.delete_permanently_hint: When enabled, books are not moved to trash but deleted immediately.
settings.allow_books_without_author_hint: When enabled, you can import or save books without setting an author. Useful for converting documents to audiobooks where author info is not required.
settings.ai_description: Provider, API key and model for the editor's AI features.
settings.ai_enable_hint: When disabled, all AI features are hidden.
settings.ai_key_hint: The API key is stored locally and only sent to the service specified in 'Base URL'.
settings.ai_api_key_external_note: API key is read from external configuration (~/.config/bibliogon/secrets.yaml or BIBLIOGON_AI_API_KEY environment variable). Edit the file directly or set the variable to change the key.
settings.ai_lmstudio_hint: Running locally, no API key required. Models are provided by the LM Studio server.
settings.ai_err_rate: Rate limit reached. Please try again later.
settings.ai_err_disabled: AI features are disabled. Enable them at Settings > General > AI Assistant.
settings.ai_test_browser_unsupported: A connection test may not be possible in browser mode for this provider. The API key is verified on the first AI call.
settings.ai_configured_providers_hint: Overview of stored keys. The radio button selects the active provider; to change or add one, configure a provider in the form below.
settings.ai_test_desktop_only: Testable in the desktop app only
settings.ai_delete_key_confirm: Remove the stored API key for {provider}?
settings.editor_description: Autosave intervals, draft retention and AI context limit.
settings.editor_draft_age_hint: Local drafts older than this are deleted
settings.editor_ai_chars_hint: Maximum character count for AI suggestions
settings.pdf_defaults_hint: Default values for the export controls; can be overridden per-export inline.
settings.kdp_default_marketplace_hint: Default marketplace for the KDP Publishing Wizard. Overridable per book in the wizard.
settings.skip_non_destructive_confirmations_hint: When enabled: actions like "Convert to book?", "Import?" run without a prompt. Destructive actions (delete, trash, danger zone) ALWAYS prompt.
settings.export_engine_hint: Which engine the export uses. "Automatic" uses Pandoc (LaTeX PDF) online and the browser export offline. "Browser" always exports in the browser; "Backend" always uses Pandoc (online only).
settings.auto_check_hint: Checks for new versions in the background.

authors_database.title: Authors Database
authors_database.description: Catalogue of other authors that powers autocomplete suggestions in wizards and editors. Your own identity lives above under "Author profile".
authors_database.hint: Collection of known authors for the book wizard. Existing books and articles are independent — changes here only affect new suggestions.
authors_database.delete_message: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}" from the database? Existing books and articles remain unchanged.

get_started.title: Get Started
get_started.all_done: You now know all the important features of Bibliogon.
get_started.sample_book_hint: Create a book with sample chapters to explore Bibliogon.
get_started.book_type_prose_desc: Novels, non-fiction, short stories. Chapter-based with WYSIWYG or Markdown editor.
get_started.book_type_picture_desc: One image plus text per page. 5 layouts (image-top/left, speech-bubble, etc.) and KDP-ready PDF export.
get_started.book_type_comic_desc: Multi-panel layouts (grid 2x2, 3x3, etc.) with speech bubbles and panel-level images.
get_started.help_create_3: Enter title and author (pen name is loaded from settings)
get_started.help_chapters_1: Open a book from the Dashboard
get_started.help_chapters_2: Click the "+" next to "Content" in the left sidebar
get_started.help_chapters_3: Choose the chapter type: Chapter, Preface, Epilogue, etc.
get_started.help_chapters_4: The new chapter appears in the sidebar
get_started.help_write_1: Click on a chapter in the sidebar
get_started.help_write_2: The WYSIWYG editor opens on the right
get_started.help_write_3: Use the toolbar for formatting (Bold, Italic, Headings, etc.)
get_started.help_write_4: Switch to Markdown mode with the "Markdown" button at top right
get_started.help_organize_1: Grab the grip icon to the left of a chapter
get_started.help_organize_2: Drag it to the desired position
get_started.help_organize_3: Front Matter, Chapters and Back Matter are separate sections
get_started.help_organize_4: Sections can be expanded and collapsed
get_started.help_export_1: Click "Export..." at the bottom of the sidebar
get_started.help_export_2: Choose the format: EPUB, PDF, Word, HTML or Markdown
get_started.help_export_3: Choose the book type: E-Book, Paperback or Hardcover
get_started.help_export_4: If a table of contents exists: check "Use manual TOC"
get_started.help_export_5: Click "Export" - the file will be downloaded
get_started.help_settings_1: Open Settings via the gear icon
get_started.help_settings_3: Tab "Author": Enter your name and pen names
get_started.help_settings_4: Tab "Plugins": Activate, configure or install plugins via ZIP
get_started.help_backup_1: In the Dashboard: "Backup" button creates a .bgb file
get_started.help_backup_2: The file contains all books, chapters and images
get_started.help_backup_4: External projects (.zip, .bgp) can be loaded via "Import"

translations.label: Translations
translations.unlink_tooltip: Remove this book from its group
translations.unlink_success: Book removed from the translation group.
translations.no_other_books: No other books available to link.
translations.import_result_skipped_hint: These branches were skipped. Fix the problem in the repository and re-import the translation group.

articles.content_type_tooltip: Content type: Blog post / Tutorial / Review / Essay / Newsletter / Interview / Listicle / Short story.
articles.empty_subtitle: Create your first article to write long-form posts separately from books.

bulk.limit_warning_50: Selecting more than 50 articles may take a while.

articles.excerpt_placeholder: Short summary used by newsletters and SEO snippets.
articles.subtitle_tooltip: Optional subtitle. Some platforms render it below the title.
articles.author_tooltip: The text's author. Pick from your real name + pen names in Settings.
articles.topic_tooltip: Primary category for the text. Managed in Settings > Topics.
articles.seo_title_tooltip: Search-engine-optimized title. Falls back to the text title when empty.
articles.seo_description_tooltip: Search-engine description. Falls back to the excerpt when empty.
articles.canonical_url_tooltip: If the text was first published elsewhere, paste that URL here. Prevents duplicate-content SEO penalties.
articles.featured_image_tooltip: Hero image for social-media previews (Open Graph / Twitter Card). Drop, click, or paste a URL.
articles.featured_image_dropzone: Drop image or click to choose
articles.featured_image_url_tooltip: Alternative: paste the URL of an already-hosted image.
articles.translate_hint: Creates a new draft in the target language. Inline formatting (bold/italic) is lost during translation.
articles.translate_same_language: Target language must differ from source.
articles.translate_provider_unconfigured: Provider not configured. Open Settings > Plugins > Translation to add an API key.
articles.translate_no_providers: No translation provider configured. Open Settings > Plugins > Translation to set up DeepL or LMStudio.
articles.featured_image_hint: Hero image for social-media previews. Upload coming soon - paste a URL for now.
articles.excerpt_tooltip: Short summary. Used as fallback for newsletter previews and SEO descriptions.
articles.tags_tooltip: Keywords for categorization and search. Add multiple entries (Enter to add).
articles.subtitle: Subtitle
articles.author: Author
articles.delete_body: This text will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
articles.delete_trash_body: This text will be moved to the trash. You can restore it later.
articles.delete_permanent_warning: Permanently delete text? Every publication and uploaded image will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
articles.empty_trash_warning: Every article in the trash will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
articles.empty_filtered: No articles match the current filters.
articles.seo_title_generate_tooltip: Generate SEO title from text content (uses AI).
articles.seo_description_generate_tooltip: Generate SEO description from text content (uses AI).
articles.tags_generate_tooltip: Generate tags from text content (uses AI). Replaces current tags.
articles.ai_generate_needs_content: Text needs content before AI can generate.
articles.seo_title_placeholder: Falls back to title when empty
articles.seo_description_placeholder: Falls back to excerpt when empty

publications.title: Publications
publications.drift_warning: Live version may be out of sync with current draft.
publications.delete_body: This publication will be removed. The text itself stays unchanged.

metadata.quality_tip_words: Significantly more words than the book average ({avg}). Consider splitting the chapter.
metadata.quality_tip_filler: Filler word ratio above the book average ({avg}%). Reduce filler words.
metadata.quality_tip_passive: Passive voice ratio above the book average ({avg}%). Prefer active phrasing.
metadata.quality_tip_adverb: Adverb ratio above the book average ({avg}%). Use stronger verbs instead.
metadata.quality_tip_long: More long sentences than the book average ({avg}). Shorten or split sentences.
metadata.quality_nested_hint: These sentences could benefit from being split.
metadata.quality_wordcount_info: All words in the body text, including headings, are counted. Text formatting is not counted; the number may differ slightly from other editors.
metadata.quality_disclaimer: This report analyzes stylistic features of your text. It does not replace a content edit. Argument quality, factual accuracy, tone consistency and chapter structure are not checked.
metadata.subtitle: Subtitle
metadata.words_per_day: {days} days left, ~{n} words/day for the full target
metadata.book_idea_placeholder: In brief: 1-2 sentences — what is it about?
metadata.repository_url_hint: Optional. External git-repo link for books not imported via plugin-git-sync.
metadata.repository_url_managed_hint: Managed by plugin-git-sync — manual edits would diverge from the round-trip.
metadata.categories_hint: KDP-style category names. Free-text; every retailer has its own taxonomy.
metadata.bisac_format_error: Invalid format. Expected: 3 uppercase letters + 6 digits (e.g. FIC022020).
metadata.copy_hint: Copies publisher, author bio and CSS from another book:
metadata.ai_cost_hint: Estimated cost based on typical provider pricing
metadata.title: Title
metadata.author: Author
metadata.author_add_failed: Failed to add author to the Authors database

cover.help: JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 10 MB. KDP recommends 1600x2560 pixels.
cover.drop_hint: Drop image here or click to browse

audio_progress.title: Generating audiobook
audio_progress.saved_hint: Audiobook generated successfully. Files are now available under Metadata > Audiobook.
audio_progress.dry_run_hint: Generates only the first paragraph of the first chapter. Verifies engine and voice work and shows estimated cost.
audio_progress.completed_hint: Audiobook ready - click to open metadata
audio_progress.completion_toast: Audiobook ready. Now available under Metadata > Audiobook.

error_report.title: Create Issue Report
error_report.intro: Bibliogon detected an error and can prepare a bug report for the developer.
error_report.privacy: No book content, no passwords, no license keys are ever sent.
error_report.intro_manual: Create a report with your recent actions to report a problem.

help.title: Help
help.completion_toast: Audiobook ready. Now available under Metadata > Audiobook.

audiobook.custom_filename_hint: Without extension. Leave empty to use the default name.
audiobook.overwrite_description: When enabled, all previously generated MP3 files for this book will be overwritten on the next export. When disabled, only missing or changed chapters will be regenerated (default).
audiobook.read_chapter_number_description: When enabled, the TTS speaks an ordinal intro ('First chapter', 'Second chapter') before each chapter. Disabled by default because most books do not want spoken chapter markers.
audiobook.skip_description: The following chapter types will NOT be narrated
audiobook.skip_hint: Selected types will be skipped during audiobook export and not narrated.
audiobook.google_uploaded: Google Cloud credentials saved. Loading voices...
audiobook.google_hint: Google Cloud Console > Project > Enable Cloud Text-to-Speech API > Create Service Account > Download JSON key.
audiobook.elevenlabs_hint: Only required for the ElevenLabs engine. Create a free account at elevenlabs.io and generate an API key in your profile.
audiobook.downloads_empty: No audiobook generated yet. Use the export dialog to create one.
audiobook.delete_confirm: Really delete the audiobook? The files will be gone afterwards.
audiobook.regen_warning:
An audiobook for this book already exists.
Engine: {engine} | Voice: {voice} | {created}

A new export will overwrite the existing files.

Recreate anyway?
audiobook.status_partial: Export incomplete. Some chapters have not been generated yet.
audiobook.previews_empty: No previews yet. Use the Preview button in the editor to generate one.

keywords.too_long: Keyword must be at most {max} characters
keywords.no_comma: Keyword must not contain a comma
keywords.over_limit: Amazon KDP recommends a maximum of 7 keywords. Other platforms may allow more.
keywords.hard_limit: Maximum of {max} keywords reached. Delete an entry to add more.
keywords.hint: Double-click to edit, drag-and-drop to reorder

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred in this area. Reload the page to continue.

ai_wizard.title: Set up AI Assistant
ai_wizard.step1_hint: Choose your AI provider. You can change this later in Settings.
ai_wizard.no_key_needed: LM Studio does not require an API key. Make sure the server is running.
ai_wizard.step3_hint: Test the connection to your AI provider.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Tip: Press Ctrl+/ to open this overview at any time.

offline.storage_almost_full: Browser storage is almost full. Remove offline books you no longer need to free up space.
offline.banner_message: You are offline. Changes are saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
offline.sync_partial: Some chapters could not be synced.
offline.conflicts_found: Conflict found. Please resolve it in Settings.

update_banner.message: A new version of Bibliogon is available.

versions.title: Version history
versions.description: The last 20 auto-saved revisions plus your manual snapshots. Restore overwrites the current content - the current version is first saved as a new snapshot.
versions.load_failed: Version history could not be loaded.
versions.delete_confirm_message: This snapshot will be permanently removed.
versions.restore_confirm_message: The current content will be overwritten. The current version is saved as a new snapshot first.
versions.diff_failed: The comparison could not be loaded.

conflict.title: This chapter was updated elsewhere
conflict.description: Another change was saved before you submitted yours. Pick what should happen with your local changes.
conflict.save_as_new_chapter_tooltip: Save the local edits as a new chapter inserted directly after this one; the current chapter keeps the server version.
conflict.saved_as_new_chapter: Local edits saved as new chapter "{title}".
conflict.save_as_new_failed: Saving as a new chapter failed.

donations.intro: Bibliogon is developed as an open-source project without tracking, without a cloud backend, without ads. If the app helps you and you want to support the project:
donations.more_info: More about the donation channels on the [support page](/help).

channels.liberapay_desc: Privacy-friendly, FOSS community, no donor account required.
channels.github_desc: Developer-native, monthly recurring, GitHub matches new sponsors in year one.
channels.kofi_desc: Low barrier, one-time 'buy me a coffee' style, no donor account required.
channels.paypal_desc: Widest reach, one-time, credit card works without a PayPal account.

donations.onboarding_body: Bibliogon is developed as an open-source project without tracking, without a cloud backend, without ads. If the app helps you and you want to support the project:
donations.onboarding_hint: You can find this hint any time in Settings.
donations.reminder_body: You have been using Bibliogon for three months. If you enjoy the project:

import_wizard.title: Import Book
import_wizard.articles_only_body: This backup contains {count} article(s) and no books. Click Import to restore them.
import_wizard.step_1_drop_zone: Drop file here or click to browse
import_wizard.warn_large_file: Large file ({size}); detection may take a moment.
import_wizard.hint_no_cover: No cover image detected; you can assign one below.
import_wizard.duplicate_overwrite_confirm: This will replace all chapters and assets of '{title}'. The existing book's edit history will be lost. Continue?
import_wizard.status_creating_subtle: This may take a moment for large imports.
import_wizard.success_multi_subtitle: Open one to start editing, or close the wizard to return to the dashboard.
import_wizard.step_1_pick_folder: Or pick a folder of Markdown files
import_wizard.error_folder_too_many: Too many files in folder ({count}); maximum {max}.
import_wizard.step_1_git_url_hint: Public HTTPS only in this version. The target repo must follow the write-book-template structure.
import_wizard.error_git_url_invalid: Not a recognised git URL. Expected https://, git@ or ssh://git@ prefix.
import_wizard.badge_tooltip: Imported; edit in the metadata panel after import.
import_wizard.covers_hint: Multiple covers detected. Pick the primary cover for book.cover_image. All files are imported as cover assets and can be swapped later in the metadata editor.
import_wizard.author_assets_hint: Portrait, signature, or bio images imported for the Design tab of the metadata editor.
import_wizard.git_detected_hint: The import source contains a .git/ directory. Pick whether to adopt its history into the new book.
import_wizard.git_start_fresh_desc: Ignore the imported .git/ directory. A new repo will be created on the first local edit.
import_wizard.git_adopt_with_remote_desc: Keep commits, branches and the remote URL. Credentials are stripped before adoption.
import_wizard.git_adopt_without_remote_desc: Keep commits and branches. Discard the remote URL so you can wire up a fresh one.
import_wizard.author_not_in_settings: Author "{name}" is not in your Settings.
import_wizard.author_action_create: Create "{name}" as a new author profile
import_wizard.author_action_defer_hint: Imports without an author; edit via the metadata editor.
import_wizard.error_cancelled_server_side: Import was cancelled on the server.

medium_import.intro: Import your Medium archive (Download your information ZIP) into Bibliogon as articles. Each post becomes one article; the canonical URL is tracked so re-importing the same archive is safe.
medium_import.intro_offline: Import your Medium archive (ZIP) directly in the browser as articles. Comments are skipped; images stay linked to Medium's CDN.

upload.card_hint: Pick the ZIP that Medium emailed you. Maximum 200 MB.
upload.dropzone_secondary: or click to choose a file
upload.dropzone_aria: Drop a Medium ZIP here or click to pick one
upload.large_warning: Very large archive (>50 MB). Upload may take a moment.

progress.processing: Processing on the server. Larger archives may take longer.

preview.card_hint: Uncheck the boxes for posts you do NOT want to import. All posts are selected by default.
preview.in_progress_card_hint: The import runs in the background. You can leave this page — the badge in the bottom-left shows progress and brings you back.
preview.empty: The archive contains no readable posts.
preview.badge_dedup_tooltip: An article with the same URL already exists.
preview.run_in_background_hint: Import continues in the background; a badge shows progress.

settings.card_hint: These settings apply to every future import. Per-book or per-article overrides are not supported.
settings.download_images_hint: Recommended. Stores images in Bibliogon storage instead of pointing at the Medium CDN.
settings.skip_existing_hint: Articles with the same Medium URL are not re-imported.
settings.set_first_image_as_featured: Use first image as featured image
settings.set_first_image_as_featured_hint: Recommended. The first image in the article body becomes the article's featured image. Posts without images stay without one.
settings.pointer_hint: Settings and imports are managed on the dedicated Medium-import page.

gate.expand_hint: Click to return to the Medium-import page

bulk_delete.confirm_permanent_summary: You are about to permanently delete {count} {noun}. This action CANNOT be undone.

ai_template.offline_configure_key: Configure your API key in Settings > AI to use AI fill offline.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.what: An AI template is a structured file the AI uses to generate chapters, descriptions and metadata for your book, based on its book type, genre and target audience.
intro.how: Fill in the fields you want and let the AI complete them, or export the template, fill it in externally and import it back.
intro.no_key: No AI provider is configured yet.

fill_dialog.title: Fill with AI
fill_dialog.description: Select which field-classes the AI should fill. Each class is one LLM call.
fill_dialog.force_hint: Without this, fields that already have a value stay unchanged.

seo.label: SEO
seo.desc: SEO title (max 60 chars) and meta description (150-160 chars).

tags.label: Tags
tags.desc: 5-10 lowercase tags reflecting the article's topics.

excerpt.label: Excerpt
excerpt.desc: 200-300 character conversational summary for the article list.

image_prompts.label: Image prompts
image_prompts.desc: Stable-Diffusion-style prompts: one hero + one per H2 section.

marketing_copy.label: Marketing copy
marketing_copy.desc: Back-cover description + author bio + Amazon HTML description.

cover_prompt.label: Cover prompt
cover_prompt.desc: Stable-Diffusion-style prompt for the book cover.

chapter_summaries.label: Chapter summaries
chapter_summaries.desc: One-sentence summary per existing chapter, matched by chapter id.

toast.noop: Import complete: no fields updated ({skipped} skipped)
toast.dropped_summaries: {dropped} chapter summary entr(y/ies) could not be matched and were dropped

import_dialog.title: Import filled template
import_dialog.description: Drop a filled .biblio.yaml here. The template's reference.id must match this record.
import_dialog.force_hint: Without this, populated fields stay unchanged.

new_from_template.description: Download an empty template, fill it, then upload the result.

dropzone.label_single: Drop a .biblio.yaml here, or click to choose a file
dropzone.label_bulk: Drop a .zip of templates here, or click to choose a file
dropzone.error_bulk: Please drop a .zip file produced by 'Bulk export templates'.

bulk_import.title: Bulk import filled templates
bulk_import.description: Drop a .zip of filled .biblio.yaml files. Each entry is matched to its target record by reference.id; up to 50 entries per batch.
bulk_import.force_hint: Without this, populated fields on each target stay unchanged.

confirm.title: Confirm AI-fill estimate
confirm.description: The AI will be called once per item per selected class. Review the cost below before confirming.

estimate.error: Could not fetch the cost estimate
estimate.cost_unknown: Cost is unknown because the configured model is not in the pricing table.

start.error: Could not start the bulk AI-fill job

modal.description: Live progress per item. The job keeps running if you close this modal.
modal.no_items_yet: Waiting for the first item to start...

editor.heading: Comments
editor.empty: No comments imported for this article.

admin.heading: Imported comments
admin.description: Cross-article view of comments imported from external sources.
admin.empty: No comments match the current filters.
admin.delete_message: This will move the comment to trash. Body preview: "{preview}"
admin.reclassify_message: This will move the comment to the articles list with an auto-derived title. Body preview: "{preview}"
admin.reclassify_tooltip: This action moves the comment to the articles collection. Use it when the import heuristic mis-classified an article as a comment.
admin.permanent_delete_message: The comment will be removed permanently. Body preview: "{preview}"
admin.empty_trash_message: All {count} comments in the trash will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

convert_to_book.bar_button_tooltip: Combine selected articles into a new book
convert_to_book.selection_hint: Review order and selection. Sort dropdown or drag-and-drop changes the order.
convert_to_book.metadata_subtitle_prefill: Inherits from the article subtitle when blank.
convert_to_book.add_to_authors_error: Could not add the author to the database.
convert_to_book.metadata_series_prefill: All selected articles share this series.
convert_to_book.cover_inherit_note: Cover inherits from the source article. You can replace it in the Book Editor after conversion.
convert_to_book.front_matter_title_page: Title page (empty; customise in the Book Editor)
convert_to_book.chapter_settings_use_article_title: Use article title as chapter title
convert_to_book.chapter_settings_use_article_title_hint: When off, chapters are named 'Chapter 1', 'Chapter 2', etc.
convert_to_book.review_hint: Please review. The original articles remain unchanged on the Articles dashboard.

page_editor.empty_state: No pages yet. Click + to add the first page.
page_editor.canvas_empty: Add a page from the sidebar to start authoring.
page_editor.properties_empty: Select a page to edit its properties.

layout.split_horizontal: Split horizontal (two images side by side)
layout.image_border_text_center: Image as border with centred text

collage.empty_hint: Empty collage — add images and text regions.

page_editor.delete_page_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this page? This cannot be undone.
page_editor.pdf_bleed_hint: Adds 3 mm bleed + crop marks for print-shop submission

writing_stats.title: Writing history
writing_stats.load_failed: Writing history could not be loaded.
writing_stats.empty: No writing history in this period yet.

relationship_graph.title: Relationship graph
relationship_graph.load_failed: The relationship graph could not be loaded.
relationship_graph.empty: No Story Bible entries yet. Add characters, settings, etc. to see the relationship graph.
relationship_graph.save_failed: The relationship could not be saved.
relationship_graph.delete_failed: The relationship could not be deleted.

storyboard.title: Storyboard
storyboard.filter_no_match: No pages match the selected entities.
storyboard.arc_empty: No entity appearances yet. Drag entities onto pages to build the arc.
storyboard.empty: No pages yet. Add pages from the editor to see them here.
storyboard.empty_chapters: No chapters yet. Add chapters from the editor to see them here.

comic_book_editor.overflow_title: Too many panels for this template
comic_book_editor.overflow_message: The selected template allows only {target} panel(s) but this page has {current}. {excess} extra panel(s) must be moved or deleted.
comic_book_editor.overflow_delete_confirm_message: {excess} panels with all their content (speech bubbles, images) will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
comic_book_editor.no_pages_message: Create your first comic page to start placing panels and bubbles.
comic_book_editor.add_panel_at_capacity: Maximum panel count for this layout reached
comic_book_editor.side_pane_default: Click a panel or a bubble to edit it.

lan_access.heading: LAN access
lan_access.description: Connect a second device on the same network: scan the QR code, or open the URL and enter the PIN.
lan_access.scan_hint: Scan the QR code to connect a device

export.preview_desc: A formatted preview of your export.
export.client_hint: Offline export straight in the browser. For Pandoc PDF use the desktop app.
export.client_engine_hint: Browser export is selected in Settings. For Pandoc PDF, set the export engine to "Backend".

about.heading: About Bibliogon
about.description: Version, system info, installed plugins and donation channels.
about.update_up_to_date: You are using the latest version.
about.update_available: A new version is available. Update now?
about.plugins_browser_hint: These plugins are available directly in this browser.
about.share_production_description: Share the stable app via QR code so others can open it.
about.share_preview_description: This is a preview/test version. It is not stable and may contain bugs. Share it only with testers.

kdp_publishing_wizard.metadata_hint: Required fields must be filled before this book can be uploaded to KDP. Warnings are recommendations.
kdp_publishing_wizard.cover_missing: No cover image set. KDP requires a cover.
kdp_publishing_wizard.cover_hint: Cover is checked against KDP minimum requirements (format, dimensions, aspect ratio).
kdp_publishing_wizard.cover_summary_fail: Cover does not meet KDP requirements.
kdp_publishing_wizard.export_hint: Bibliogon builds a ZIP with manuscript, cover, metadata, and a KDP cover validation report. Upload to KDP yourself — Bibliogon does NOT upload for you.
kdp_publishing_wizard.pricing_hint: Pick a royalty plan and optionally enter list prices per region. Bibliogon computes the royalty; KDP retains final pricing authority.
kdp_publishing_wizard.pricing_kdp_select: KDP Select (90 days exclusive on Amazon)
kdp_publishing_wizard.arc_hint: Optional tracking of your Advance Reader Copy reviewers. Status values are managed manually; emails are sent from your own mail client.
kdp_publishing_wizard.arc_empty: No reviewers yet. You can skip this step.
kdp_publishing_wizard.arc_load_failed: Could not load the reviewer list.
kdp_publishing_wizard.conflict_banner: The book metadata changed since the last wizard session. Please re-validate metadata + cover before building the package.
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_intro: Bibliogon does not upload for you. Here's how to publish your package on KDP:
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_step_create: Create a new title on KDP (eBook or Paperback/Hardcover).
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_step_manuscript: Upload the manuscript file from the ZIP: manuscript-ebook.epub for eBook, manuscript-paperback.pdf for print.
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_step_metadata: Transfer the details from metadata.json (title, author, description, categories, keywords).
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_step_price: Set the price (see the Pricing step for royalties + minimum price) and publish.
kdp_publishing_wizard.guide_note: Check the cover validation report (cover-validation-report.json) in the ZIP if KDP rejects the cover.
kdp_publishing_wizard.format_intro: Choose the publication format. eBook is EPUB; paperback and hardcover are print PDFs with bleed.

migration.title: Welcome to Bibliogon
migration.intro: Have you already used the app online? Your books and articles can be carried over.
migration.step_settings: Go to Settings → Data → Full backup (.bgb).
migration.settings_hint: Migrating from the online version? Export a full backup (.bgb) there and import it here with “Import backup”.

preview_banner.title: Preview/Test version
preview_banner.message: You are using a preview/test version. It is not stable and may contain bugs.
